notes: 8x8 strategic overview. Segments span buyer type x deployment intensity. Needs mix price, compliance (PLRD/MOM), tech augmentation, response speed.

us_scores_rationale.Price accessibility: S$2,400–3,000/guard vs Certis S$3,500+ — structurally cheaper via group overhead
us_scores_rationale.SG PLRD / licensing depth: Full PLRD Grade A licence + MOM compliance discipline inherited from group
us_scores_rationale.Manned-guard ops scale: Mid-scale — not the largest fleet, but enough for 50-200 guard deployments
us_scores_rationale.Tech / AI augmentation: Otsaw robotics partnership + AI CCTV analytics — SG mid-market leader on tech
us_scores_rationale.Event + ad-hoc flex: Event team runs concerts + aviation + ad-hoc — most mid-market skip this
us_scores_rationale.Onboarding speed: 3–5 days to first deployment vs 2–3 weeks industry norm
us_scores_rationale.Aviation / specialist coverage: Aviation-trained officers from Elitez Aviation sister company
us_scores_rationale.Group-backed reliability: 15yr Elitez parent + group insurance at member rates
